name: Hero MotoCorp Limited
summary: Hero MotoCorp Limited designs, develops, manufactures, assembles, and sells vehicles in India. It offers motorcycles and scooters. The company also provides engines, as well as related parts and accessories. It also exports its products to countries in Asia, Africa, the Middle East, and the South and Central America. Hero MotoCorp Limited has a strategic partnership with Gogoro Inc. to enhance the shift to sustainable electric mobility in India. The company was formerly known as Hero Honda Motors Ltd. and changed its name to Hero MotoCorp Limited in July 2011. Hero MotoCorp Limited was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
